## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (bug fixes include a regression test)
- [ ] Behavior changes are reflected in OpenSpec and/or docs
- [ ] `openspec validate --specs` passes (if specs changed)
- [ ] The relevant suite is green locally (Swift / web / Android)
- [ ] Clients kept in parity where shared behavior changed (or scope noted below)
